---
title: "Unrefereed Course Notes"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

note_entries <- c("Title", "Author", "Subject", "Pages", "University", "Contact", "Abstract")

note_data <- c("Advanced Calculus I", "Parker, G. Edgar", "calculus", "23", "James Madison University", "", "Topics include the logic of quantification, and a theory of sets and ordered pairs. This material is presented with a sequence of problems and theorems, so that students can be given the responsibility for both discovering and understanding why the mathematics covered in this course guide is correct.
")


tibble(note_entries, note_data) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = "left") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = "top"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = "80%", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)  


```
- [Download File](./advanced-calculus-1_parker.pdf)

This course guide was donated to a collection originally gathered by MathNerds. The author retains copyright. You are free to use these materials for your classes.
